#v.description: A document is any file that a user has stored on the system.  Typically this value will be provided from a Process Variable.
Dictionary is mapping of keys to values.

values.caption: In a process, the Classify Documents smart service uses the published model. You can always replace the published model, but you can only have one published model at a time.
All models in the same skill should solve the same business use case. If you want to classify different types of documents for another purpose, we recommend creating a new AI skill.

values.#v: Begin by building a model to recognize and classify specific document types.
You can create and train additional models to meet your requirements.
